model.description: MiMo • The flagship foundation for the agentic era, built for complex, long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks.

pick.rationale: Arizona is the #1 seed in the West with elite metrics (KenPom/Torvik rank #3) and a 31-2 record, featuring top-10 offense and top-3 defense. Utah State, while a solid Mountain West champion, lacks comparable analytical ratings and faces a massive talent disparity. The Wildcats' depth, tournament experience, and overall superiority make them heavy favorites to advance to the Sweet 16.

reasoningStep.title: Arizona vs Utah State Round of 32 Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Arizona's elite metrics and #1 seed status give them a decisive advantage over Utah State.
reasoningStep.evidence: Arizona ranks #3 in both KenPom and Torvik with a 31-2 record, featuring elite offensive efficiency (rank 7-10) and defensive efficiency (rank 3). Utah State's ratings are unavailable in the dataset, suggesting they are a significantly weaker team analytically. As a #1 seed, Arizona has a massive talent advantage and tournament experience, while Utah State is an 8-seed from the Mountain West. The matchup represents a classic 1 vs 8 disparity where the higher seed typically prevails.
